title: palicourea elata
intro: Palicourea elata, also known as the "Sangre de Drago" or "Dragon's Blood Tree", is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Palicourea elata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Palicourea elata is commonly prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional rituals and ceremonies.
